S.FORM: Scott Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 10, Scott Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1997) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~…ē ¶~ ®ott arms~…ētroŇč s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, s~…ē ¶~ ®ott arms~…ētroŇč, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
